title: Intense Mexican Beans Frijoles Charros
description: A bitter, gooey one-pot Mexican bean dish loaded with spring onions, chipotle, and tomato, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Heat the tagine pot over medium heat and sauté the onion, garlic, and chipotle until fragrant about 3 minutes.
Add the cumin and smoked paprika and cook for another minute until spices are toasted.
Stir in the diced tomatoes and let them soften for 2-3 minutes.
Add the black beans and vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer.
Cover the pot and let the mixture cook for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Deglaze the pot with a splash of lime juice and season with smoked sea salt.
Uncover and reduce the liquid until the dish becomes thick and gooey, about 10 minutes.
Add the sliced spring onions and simmer for an additional 5 minutes until tender.
Taste and adjust seasoning, adding more salt or lime if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
